calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn 1)Compelling Responses To Form & Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production 2)For An Order Deeming Matters To Be Admitted And 3)For An Award Of Monetary Santions And Appendix
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Sherrie Matza's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is moot, however, monetary sanctions in the amount of $1247 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn 1)Compelling Responses To Form & Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production 2)For An Order Deeming Matters To Be Admitted And 3)For An Award Of Monetary Santions And Appendix
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Brian McCauley, Esq., for Defendant/Cross-complainant and moving party: Sherrie Matza
Walter J. R. Traver, Esq., for plaintiff/Cross-defendant and opposing party: Edward J. Murphy

After hearing, tentative ruling is vacated and Defendant Sherrie Matza's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is continued to May 13, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 610, to verify compliance with providing discovery. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,247 payable withing 30 days. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn 1)Compelling Responses To Form & Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production 2)For An Order Deeming Matters To Be Admitted And 3)For An Award Of Monetary Santions And Appendix
Off Calendar Apr-04-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Defendant Sherrie Matza's motion to compel responses to form interrogatoriess, special interrogatories, request for production of documents and deem matters admitted, is continued to May 6, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
